title: ANC - 1. Main in-call scenario > Automatic toggle to ANC feature
scenario: ANC and Transparency mode behavior does not automatically switch during calls and restore previous settings after call ends
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Set ANC mode to OFF (select either Adaptive or Standard).
5. Set Transparency Mode to ON (select either Environment or Speech).
6. Start or join a call (e.g., Zoom, Teams, or mobile call).
7. Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode status during the call.
8. During the call, tap the Transparency Mode toggle.
11. Observe the ANC and Transparency Mode status after the call ends.
expected: When ANC is OFF and Transparency is ON, starting a call should automatically turn ANC ON with the previously selected option and make Transparency Mode greyed out/inaccessible. Tapping the Transparency Mode toggle during a call shows a popup informing the user the option is unavailable. After leaving the call, ANC turns OFF and Transparency Mode becomes accessible again with the previously selected option. The user can then toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
